name: CobbleStone Contract Insight API
what_it_does: CobbleStone Contract Insight contract lifecycle management (CLM) REST API for contract creation, negotiation, compliance, and renewal management. Enables AI agents to manage contract creation and template automation for standardized contract generation, handle contract review and approval workflow routing for contract execution management, access contract obligation tracking and milestone monitoring for compliance automation, retrieve contract analytics and spend visibility for procurement intelligence, manage vendor and supplier contract repositories for centralized contract governance, handle contract renewal notification and auto-renewal management for contract continuity, access AI-assisted contract review and risk clause identification for contract risk management, retrieve contract search and full-text analysis for legal operations automation, manage contract amendment and change order processing for contract modification workflow, and integrate CobbleStone with ERP, procurement, and legal management platforms.
use_cases: Generating contracts from legal automation agents
Tracking obligations from compliance monitoring agents
Managing renewals from contract operations agents
Analyzing contract risk from legal intelligence agents
not_for: Simple document storage without workflow requirements
Consumer agreements at scale (use DocuSign or Adobe Sign)
Complex litigation matter management (use legal matter platforms)
best_when: A procurement team, legal operations function, or enterprise wanting AI agents to automate contract drafting from templates, obligation tracking, renewal management, risk clause identification, and contract analytics across a centralized contract repository.
avoid_when: ATTORNEY-CLIENT PRIVILEGE FOR CONTRACT DRAFTING: Automated contract generation for legal strategy matters must coordinate with supervising attorney; automated contract creation without attorney review for significant agreements creates unauthorized practice of law risk if the automation service is not under attorney direction. Contract obligation accuracy — automated contract obligation extraction from natural language must be validated by contract manager; automated obligation creation from imprecise AI extraction without human review creates missed obligation and breach risk. Auto-renewal blocking — automated contract renewal notifications must be tested for delivery reliability; missed auto-renewal notification due to automation failure can lock organization into unwanted multi-year contract commitment. Confidentiality in contract data — automated contract repository access must respect confidentiality classifications; automated agent with broad repository access may expose confidential negotiated terms to unauthorized users.

auth.notes: CobbleStone uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Princeton, New Jersey HQ. Founded 1995. Private. Mid-market CLM for government, healthcare, and enterprise. Gartner-recognized CLM vendor. Contract Insight platform. Competes with Ironclad, DocuSign CLM, and Conga for enterprise contract management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; per-user and enterprise tiers; AI features additional
pricing.notes: Princeton NJ. Founded 1995. Private. Government, healthcare, enterprise focus. Gartner-recognized CLM. Per-user annual subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: AUTO-RENEWAL NOTIFICATION DELIVERY RELIABILITY: Automated contract renewal notification must be tested for reliable delivery; missed renewal notification due to email filtering or automation error can allow unwanted contract auto-renewal for multi-year term; implement multi-channel notification with delivery confirmation and fallback

Attorney review for significant agreements — automated contract generation from templates for high-value or high-risk agreements must route to supervising attorney for review before execution; automated contract execution without attorney review for significant agreements creates organizational legal exposure

AI obligation extraction validation — automated contract obligation extraction using CobbleStone AI must be validated against source contract language; AI extraction errors in obligation tracking create missed deadline and breach risk; implement human review for high-priority obligation extraction

Confidentiality access control — automated contract repository access must apply confidentiality classification rules; service account with broad repository access can expose negotiated terms and pricing to unauthorized internal users; implement row-level security in automated queries

Contract amendment audit trail — automated contract amendment and modification must maintain complete version and approval history; automated amendment without audit trail creates contract dispute evidence gap

Webhook delivery for approval events — CobbleStone approval workflow webhook events must implement retry and idempotency; duplicate approval event delivery can trigger duplicate downstream actions; implement approval event ID deduplication
agent_readiness.security_notes: CLM platform. SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US. Contract terms, obligations, and procurement data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Contract management. SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US. Contract terms and procurement data.
